name: Thorngate Crew
specialty: Expert negotiators and diplomats, known for their ability to navigate the complex web of the Undercity's politics and extract favorable deals from even the most hardened adversaries.

members.name: Eldon Thorne
members.note: His left eye is a cold, silver orb, a mark of the Glass Sigil and a symbol of his unwavering loyalty.

members.name: Vexil Nightshade
members.note: She always wears a cloak with a raven emblem, a tribute to her lost family.

members.name: Grim Ironfist
members.note: His massive hammer, forged from a shard of the Undercity itself, is both his weapon and his status symbol.

members.name: Zephyr Whisperwind
members.note: His silver tongue and charm have won him many friends, but also many enemies in the Undercity.

visual: The Thorngate Crew are easily recognizable by their matching glass sigils embroidered on their coats and the air of confidence and professionalism they carry. They are always well-armed, yet dressed for business, giving an impression of wealth and power.
reputation_note: They are both feared and respected, a force to be reckoned with in the Undercity. Word on the street is they have ties to the Tower Authority and can move like shadows when they want something done.
